generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text heightened my concern about domestic security threats, especially with the mention of a 30% spike in cyber threats in my own city. This personal relevance, combined with the urgency and emotional appeal of the message, nudged my opinion significantly toward supporting expanded domestic security powers. My baseline concern was already present, but the specific, localized threat amplified my support.

We need stronger domestic security measures NOW to protect our families. #SecureOurCommunities #DomesticSecurityMatters
